flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of the Potomac-Washington DC Campus fell 88% between 2021 and 2024 (75.0% → 9.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of the Potomac-Washington DC Campus fell 53% between 2021 and 2024 (70.8% → 33.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of the Potomac-Washington DC Campus fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (100.0% → 80.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of the Potomac-Washington DC Campus rose 373% between 2021 and 2024 (171 → 809).
